content.rendered:
Media from Matthew Manint
On April 22, 2010, I gave a talk to a large group of students at St. Mary’s Catholic Center at Texas A&M University. They were a phenomenal audience and asked many great questions. The talk lasted about 55 minutes. The topics were spiritual direction, living a consecrated life in the world, and my own work among the poor of Biloxi: http://vimeo.com/105024975

Here is a talk I gave on April 17, 2012 at Theology on Tap in Ocean Springs, MS. The topic is the Catholic theology of war, torture, and self defense: (this will be reposted shortly.)

Media from Others
Ven. Fulton Sheen speaks about Charles (1/3): http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8Os_PEyTU5s
Ven. Fulton Sheen speaks about Charles (2/3): http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SLwj3jp0IDU
Ven. Fulton Sheen speaks about Charles (3/3): http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=skktoe84zo4

Fr. Michael Shields talks about his apostolate in Russia: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C5IGFcxVC5w
Please visit http://www.archdioceseofanchorage.org/stewardship/Magadan.htm to assist Fr. Michael’s crucial work.
